title: Paths, Navigation, and Filesystem Hierarchy
description: Locate application configuration and logs on a workstation whose current directory and distribution conventions differ from a familiar machine. Learners cumulatively produce a path-resolution and filesystem-map notebook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Resolve absolute, relative, home-relative, dot, and parent paths from a stated working directory.
Use pwd, cd, and directory stacks while predicting the resulting working directory before each transition.
Relate root-level directories to boot, configuration, devices, variable data, user data, runtime state, and optional software roles.
